The Great Article

An opening paragraph with a relative link and an external link to set the scene, plus a protocol-relative link and a jump link.

Section One

Some more prose here that continues the article body and gives the extractor enough signal to treat this region as the main content of the page rather than chrome. It runs comfortably past the length threshold so the article body is kept.

  • First bullet point
  • Second bullet point

    • nested b

A memorable and sufficiently long pull-quote from the piece.

A closing paragraph with an image and yet more text to keep the article comfortably above the length threshold.
